description:
Trace-shape the Stalled→Emitted promotion so the reducer's reason survives.

## Shape

```rust
CallsiteOutcome::Emitted {
    target: SpecKey,
    came_from: Option<StalledReason>,  // None if typer-discovered without prior Stalled
}
```

## Wire up

- Update enum in src/fz_ir.rs (~line 182).
- ir_typer.rs `apply_callsite_outcomes` (~line 830): when replacing an entry that was `Stalled { reason }`, populate `came_from: Some(reason)`. When the prior entry was None/Consumed (shouldn't happen per current invariants but defensive), leave `came_from: None`.
- main.rs dump_outcomes_pipeline (~line 857): print `Emitted (target) via Reason` when came_from is Some.
- Test goldens: pattern matches in ir_typer_tests.rs and any expected.outcomes that mention Emitted need updating (BLESS=1).

## Single ticket because

Enum + propagation + dump are tightly coupled; splitting introduces a half-broken intermediate state.

## Independent of Arc 1

No dependency on fz-f88.1-3. Can land in parallel.
title: fz-RS.4 — Emitted carries Option<StalledReason>; dump prints via Reason
